3i Infotech, incorporated in 1993 as 'ICICI Investors Services Limited' and initially an ICICI subsidiary until 2002, is an Indian public global information technology company headquartered in Navi Mumbai. It provides IT services and software solutions, including digital transformation, cloud computing, and cybersecurity, utilizing technologies like AI and blockchain. The company serves over 1,200 customers in more than 50 countries from 24 offices across 12 nations.
